title: refactor: call_batch erases type info — reconsider API
description:
## Problem
call_batch returns HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>, erasing all type information after the HTTP call. Callers must then manually serde_json::from_value to recover types, partially duplicating what the typed call + extract_response pattern already handles cleanly.

## Solution
Evaluate whether call_batch is pulling its weight or should be removed in favor of callers assembling typed responses via extract_response. If kept, document clearly why it exists and when to prefer it over the typed path. A typed batch helper (e.g. accepting a tuple of expected response types) could replace it.

## Acceptance
- call_batch is either removed, replaced with a typed variant, or documented with a clear rationale for its existence
- No regression in batch-request functionality
